name_en: 🔥 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag 💥 The Puzzle features a distinctive rectangular shape outlined by unique geometric lines.🎁 This large version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim-style details.💋 Geometric Bag 33CM Puzzle Handbag, original imported calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜 The Puzzle handbag is the first tote bag launched by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for LOEWE ⚡️ The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This large size version is made of soft grained calfskin *Large Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 🎁
name_cn:
🔥 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag 💥 The Puzzle features a distinctive rectangular shape outlined by unique geometric lines.🎁 This large version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim-style details.💋 Geometric Bag 33CM Puzzle Handbag, original imported calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜 The Puzzle handbag is the first tote bag launched by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for LOEWE ⚡️ The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This large size version is made of soft grained calfskin *Large Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 🎁
Dimensions: 33CM~21.5CM~14.5CM
Style No.: 9165
Color: Antique Brown
